activities_projects.title: Analyse the Meaning of Marginalisation
activities_projects.objective: Develop a deeper understanding of marginalisation in society
steps: Write the meaning of marginalisation
Explain how marginalisation affects people’s opportunities
Give two examples from Indian society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the concept and impact of marginalisation
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Study of Marginalised Communities
activities_projects.objective: Understand the challenges faced by marginalised groups
steps: Choose one marginalised community mentioned in the chapter
Write the main problems faced by the community
Explain how society and government can help
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses issues faced by marginalised communities

activities_projects.title: Research on Constitutional Safeguards
activities_projects.objective: Understand constitutional protections for marginalised groups
steps: Find two constitutional provisions protecting marginalised groups
Explain what each provision means
Describe how they help promote equality
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands constitutional safeguards for social justice

activities_projects.title: Debate on Equality and Justice
steps: Prepare arguments on why equality is important in society
Discuss how discrimination affects marginalised groups
Present your opinion with examples

activities_projects.title: Case Study on Discrimination
steps: Find a news report related to discrimination
Write a short summary of the event
Explain how laws and rights could prevent such discrimination
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects real-life issues with civic principles
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Compare Rights and Laws
activities_projects.objective: Understand the difference between rights and laws
steps: Write the meaning of Fundamental Rights
Write the meaning of protective laws
Explain how both help marginalised groups
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops deeper understanding of legal protection

activities_projects.title: Poster: Equal Rights for All
activities_projects.objective: Promote awareness about equality and justice
steps: Design a poster showing equal rights for all communities
Add slogans promoting equality and dignity
Explain the message of the poster

activities_projects.title: Essay on Social Justice
activities_projects.objective: Explain the importance of social justice in democracy
steps: Write an essay explaining social justice
Explain how laws help reduce marginalisation
Include examples from Indian society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the role of justice in democracy
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and depth of essay (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role of Government in Reducing Marginalisation
activities_projects.objective: Understand the responsibility of the government
steps: Write two actions taken by the government to support marginalised groups
Explain why these actions are necessary
Give one example for each action
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands government efforts toward social equality

activities_projects.title: Critical Thinking: Equality in Daily Life
activities_projects.objective: Apply the concept of equality to everyday situations
steps: Write three situations where people may face discrimination
Explain how society should respond to these situations
Relate them to the idea of equality and justice
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies civic concepts to real-life situations
